title: Transforming Touch - Part 2 - April 21-26, 2027
summary: A Body-Based Approach to Healing Developmental Trauma
description: For more information, including registration, visit the website here. Deepen your trauma-informed healing practice. Transforming Touch® is a gentle, body-based approach (therapy) that uses safe, attuned touch to help heal early developmental trauma and strengthen secure attachment. Participants will learn Dr. Terrell's 7-Point Protocol, a powerful method for supporting regulation, connection, and healing in clients with trauma-related issues. This is a one-time, two-part training opportunity for professionals and practitioners interested in deepening their trauma-informed healing practice.
